description: Bacteriophage 186 bacterial attachment site attB; the 46 bp E. coli chromosomal target at the tRNA-Ile (ileX/ileY) locus for 186 integrase + IHF.

references.title: Conditional-replication, integration, excision, and retrieval plasmid-host systems for gene structure-function studies of bacteria

references.authors: St-Pierre F, Cui L, Priest DG, Endy D, Dodd IB, Shearwin KE
references.title: One-step cloning and chromosomal integration of DNA

references.authors: Kalionis B, Dodd IB, Egan JB
references.title: Control of gene expression in the P2-related template coliphages. III. DNA sequence of the major control region of phage 186

label: 186_attB
note: Phage 186 bacterial attachment site attB, overlapping the 3′ half of the tRNA-Ile gene (preserved on integration). 46 bp shared core (identical to the 186_attP core), read 5′->3′ on the minus strand of NC_000913.3 at the tRNA-Ile locus. NCBI annotates the gene as ileX (b3069); the phage/pOSIP literature names the site ileY (distinct from NCBI ileY b2652 — a nomenclature caveat). Cognate phage site: 186_attP.

provenance.sequence_source: NC_000913.3 (E. coli K-12 MG1655), tRNA-Ile gene (NCBI ileX b3069; the 186 literature calls this locus ileY), minus strand positions 3215628..3215673, 100% identity over 46 bp
